title: The Ancient River That Shaped Mars

scenes.text: Mars was once sculpted by rivers, shaping its surface like Earth!
Scientists discovered ancient river channels on Mars, hinting at past water flow.
These findings suggest Mars may have once supported life.
The red planet's past is more Earth-like than we realized.
scenes.label: EARTH-LIKE PAST

scenes.text: Follow for daily science that blows your mind.

description: Ancient river channels on Mars suggest its surface was shaped by water, hinting at the possibility of life. Follow for daily science!
